name: Lazarus
oracleText:
When Lazarus enters the battlefield, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.
If Lazarus would die, exile him instead and return him to the battlefield tapped under his owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Resurrection of Lazarus" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Called from the Tomb

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Resurrection of Lazarus
classics.sourceNotes: An exact Lazarus subject match makes this the strongest classics option for the card.
